findings.message:
Exchange.exchange(address,string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#148-159) calls abi.encodePacked() with multiple dynamic arguments:
	- Exchange(transactor,targetCurrency,msg.value,exchangeRate,block.timestamp,string(abi.encodePacked(bridgeURL,targetCurrency))) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#158)
findings.name: encode-packed-collision

findings.message:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract Exchange (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#135-181) has payable functions:
	 - Exchange.exchange(address,string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#148-159)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether
findings.name: locked-ether

findings.message:
Wallet.changeMinimumQuorum(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#335-339) contains a tautology or contradiction:
	- require(bool,string)(newQuorum >= 0 && newQuorum <= 100,Invalid quorum) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#337)
findings.name: tautology

findings.message:
Wallet.updateExchangeFee(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#371-375) contains a tautology or contradiction:
	- require(bool,string)(newExchangeFee >= 0 && newExchangeFee <= 100,Invalid fee) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#373)
findings.name: tautology

findings.message: Wallet.getExchangeRate(string) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#317-319) ignores return value by IOracle(oracleContract).readRate(symbol) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#318)
findings.name: unused-return

findings.message: Wallet.requestExchangeRate(string) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#321-323) ignores return value by IOracle(oracleContract).requestRate(symbol) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#322)
findings.name: unused-return

findings.message:
Wallet.updateMaximumRateDelay(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#366-369) should emit an event for:

findings.name: events-maths

findings.message:
Wallet.updateExchangeFee(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#371-375) should emit an event for: 
	- exchangeFee = newExchangeFee (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#374)
findings.name: events-maths

findings.message:
Reentrancy in Wallet.exchange(string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#242-252):
	External calls:
	- IExchange(exchangeContract).exchange{value: amount - fee}(msg.sender,targetCurrency,targetAddress,maximumRateDelay) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#250)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Exchange(msg.sender,targetCurrency,targetAddress,amount - fee) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#251)
findings.name: reentrancy-events

findings.message:
Reentrancy in Wallet.exchangeAUTH(string,address,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#277-288):
	External calls:
	- IExchange(exchangeContract).exchange{value: amount - fee}(from,targetCurrency,targetAddress,maximumRateDelay) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#286)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Exchange(from,targetCurrency,targetAddress,amount - fee) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#287)
findings.name: reentrancy-events

findings.message:
Exchange.exchange(address,string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#148-159) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(block.timestamp - exchangeRateTime <= maximumRateDelay,Exchange rate outdated) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#156)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
Version constraint ^0.8.0 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.0 (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#8)
findings.name: solc-version
